p.hi: Bark Cape Horn Pigeon and owners. Outward account, 1893, inward account, and interest account to February 1, 1893, with J. and W. R. Wing.

row.cell: Clothing sold at California returned, less freight expenses on same
By balance to debit, owners’ account
To paid whaleboat trimmings sent out
To paid insuring goods to California, ship A. Obrig
Paid labor on boat, boards, and davits
Cedar boards, $9.48; paint on davits, 87 cents
Paid J. and W. R. Wing & Co., clothing, etc
Insuring goods to California, ship Bohemia
E. B. and F. Macey, whalecraft
Pemican meat, $20.16; T. A. Chadwick, casks, $46.37
Shelving davits, $4; E. Pierce, guns, lances, $25
To paid Cornell & Co., labor remaking over oil casks at California, stored there
To paid freight goods California, ship A. Obrig
Paid freight goods California, ship Bohemia
To paid expenses at San Francisco in refitting vessel, etc.:
Paid half expenses Captain Scullun home
S. H. Frank, leather, $5; C. Holmes, tug works, $12
W. E. Mayhew, medicines, $21.90; labor, week, $66
California Cap Company, filling bomb lances
Paid freight 1 cask clothing, per A. B., adjusted in payment new cask clothing
Board, captain and mate, waiting for ship
L. Levy, oil suits and boots
Cottell, for labor on goods sent out
To paid expenses at San Francisco in refitting vessel, etc:
W. Deacon, repairs to machinery, etc
W. Deacon, labor on boiler and pump
Tax, goods California, 54 cents; insurance, fire, goods at California, $6.49
J. and W. R. Wing & Co., clothing sent by rail
Paid E. Pierce lances and guns
Paid 1 pair opera glasses, first mate
Paid T. A. Chad wick, 1 cask for clothing
Paid ticket expenses, first mate to California
Paid sleeper, Boston to Chicago, first mate
Paid casks transferred from other vessels
Paid share, W. E. Wing, expenses to and from San Francisco, and while there on business connected with ship
Paid B. F. Wing, services at California
Paid sundry telegrams to and from California on account ship’s business
Paid sundry items to balance cash account shortage of Wm. R. Wing, payments
Paid advance orders to J. Laflin, officers, and crew
Paid additional advances to officers, etc., by Wm. Wm. R. Wing
To 2½ per cent commission on disbursements account $12,076.65
